examples: Benjamin: Oh. Thanks for asking. Everything here is hunky-dory. Don't worry.
The huge red doors slid open and a hunky fireman with shaved head listened to my tale and said he'd ask his boss.
And indeed, he found that this was better than a country's health statistics at predicting the relative attractiveness of hunky faces.
Thus, as long as the slowdown is only a temporary thing, everything should be hunky dory.
"We're not going to lie to you and say everything is hunky dory, " Wright says.
